steps.title: Identify the sufficiency threshold
steps.content: The passage states that wintering honeybees' charge (approximately 320 pC according to the graph) is “sufficiently high” to enable electrostatic pollen transfer—this establishes the minimum effective threshold.

steps.title: Apply the threshold to other species
steps.content: Red mason bees show a maximum charge of approximately 750 pC, well above the 320 pC threshold identified as sufficient for electrostatic pollen transfer; a higher charge should produce the same effect. The other choices either misrepresent the data, make unsupported claims, or draw conclusions beyond what the data supports. That matches choice D — D is correct.
